findings.message: Replace write-all with the smallest explicit permissions map required by the workflow.
Review pull_request_target carefully; it runs with base-repository privileges on untrusted pull requests.
Do not interpolate untrusted pull-request text directly into a shell script; pass it through an environment variable.
Do not pipe an unverified remote response directly into a shell; download, authenticate, and execute a pinned artifact separately.
Pin actions/checkout to a full 40-character commit SHA instead of v4.
